MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D.Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Rodney Owyang is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff with settlement authority.
Defendants Corey Alvarez and Roderick Daniel are present.
Attorney Rita Tautkus representing the defendants through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per the settlement attorney. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
